With an 18-year career in the industry, he specializes in Container Platforms, performance and optimization, monitoring and logging, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC). Enes holds the RHCA title and is now honored to join the Kubernetes community as a Kubestronaut.

person.name: Julio C. Martinez
person.bio: I am deeply passionate about Kubernetes and software development, always eager to build scalable, secure, and efficient systems. With a strong focus on CI/CD automation, I take pride in streamlining deployment workflows and accelerating delivery cycles. My technical dedication is matched only by my love for my son—he inspires me daily to grow, lead by example, and pursue excellence in everything I do.

person.name: Ashish Kumar Matapathi
person.bio: Hello! I’m Ashish Kumar Matapathi,I have a strong passion for cloud technologies and enjoy exploring the latest CNCF tools. Kubernetes is a particular area of interest for me, and I love diving into its complexities.

person.name: Geoff Loh
person.bio: Geoff is a Cloud Architect based in Auckland, New Zealand. He comes from a background of full-stack software development with commercial experience in the health and fintech industries.  As he has progressed in his career, he has become immersed into the world of Cloud and DevOps where he has helped organizations deliver cloud solutions using best DevSecOps practices.  Geoff enjoys making contributions to the community through blog posts, open source projects and presentations.

person.name: Nıjat Hasanlı
person.bio: My core background is in managing and maintaining IT systems, ensuring stability, performance, and security. Currently, I’m transitioning into the DevOps field, expanding my skills in automation, CI/CD, containerization, and cloud technologies. Passionate about continuous learning and building efficient, scalable solutions.

person.name: Michael Sigg
person.bio: System Engineer passionate about cloud-native and open-source technologies. Dedicated to mentoring the next generation of IT professionals.

person.name: Mohamed Al-Nafisa
person.bio: DevOps & Cloud Engineer

person.name: Nguyen Doan
person.bio: Hello, greetings to those who are passionate about cloud-native technologies. Like everyone else, I really enjoy exploring and delving into new things within CNCF tools, then applying these insights to my company and sharing them with others.

person.name: Icaro Rodrigues
person.bio: I am a Senior DevOps Engineer with 7+ years of experience in infrastructure, now specialized in Kubernetes and the cloud-native ecosystem. My specialties are automation and observability; I leverage CNCF tooling such as KEDA, ArgoCD, Prometheus, and Istio to architect and orchestrate scalable infrastructure solutions across AWS and Oracle Cloud. My journey as a Kubestronaut validates my deep Kubernetes knowledge and fuels my mission to help teams understand not just the how, but the crucial why behind modern cloud-native practices.

person.name: Mohamed Hedi Lajili
person.bio: I'm a data engineer deeply passionate about building trustworthy data ecosystems through robust governance and automated ETL processes. My journey to becoming a Kubestronaut represents my commitment to mastering cloud-native technologies and applying them to create scalable, high-performance data solutions. I specialize in designing pipelines that not only move data efficiently but also ensure its quality and reliability. I'm always excited to connect with fellow professionals to share insights and explore innovative approaches to data integration challenges.

person.name: Uroš Hercog
person.bio: I'm a Site Reliability Engineer at Veza, the Identity Security company, primarily focusing on tools like Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Cilium. My expertise lies in optimizing infrastructure resilience and automating deployment processes to improve reliability across dynamic environments.

person.name: Hoang Le
person.bio: Hello, I am Hoang Le a passionate cloud native advocate specializing in Kubernetes orchestration and containerization technologies.  I am skilled in Kubernetes-based container orchestration, system security hardening, and performance tuning. I am driven to simplify operations by harnessing cutting-edge technologies that boost scalability, reliability, and overall efficiency.

person.name: Raluca Bica
person.bio: Enthusiastic Kubernetes explorer with a keen interest in the cloud-native landscape. I've been working with Kubernetes technologies for over 4 years and I am eager to dive into new challenges!

person.name: Maurizio Venturelli
person.bio: As a dedicated Cloud Solution Architect with a strong focus on Kubernetes management, I bring specialized expertise in container orchestration and cloud-native solutions.  My passion for designing scalable and efficient cloud architectures has enabled me to deliver robust solutions that meet diverse business needs.  Recent projects I have worked on involved the implementation of a Kubernetes-as-a-Service solution to simplify cluster provisioning and lifecycle management, serving the needs of both internal development teams and external clients.

person.name: Tomáš Malinkovič
person.bio: I am an IT leader, teacher and builder with experience across banking, insurance, and energy sectors. I design and guide cloud-native solutions that align container orchestration with BPM workflow engines to support process-driven organizations. I focus on delivering scalable, resilient systems that connect business processes with modern infrastructure.

person.name: Aleksei Kostenko
person.bio: As a child, I dreamt of becoming an astronaut. I spoke with a slight stutter, struggling to pronounce certain letters. Yet, in some mysterious way, the angels heard my plea, and in their grace, they fulfilled it.  I'm passionate about cloud technologies, machine learning, and automation.

person.name: Guillermo Vigil Rodríguez
person.bio: Guille is a Platform Engineer focusing his professional path in cloud, infrastructure as code, Kubernetes and DevOps methodologies. Guille is constantly learning new technologies and trying to be up to date with latest news in the industry.  Also Guille is certified in Kubernetes and a CNCF Kubestronaut; he is also certified in Terraform and in AWS with Practitioner, Solutions Architect Associate, SysOps Administrator Associate and Developer Associate.  He enjoys his personal life drinking beers with friends, playing football in a team and listening electro music.

person.name: Shehab Khaled
person.bio: I am a cloud-native engineer with deep hands-on experience designing, supporting, and operating Kubernetes platforms across enterprise and multi-cloud environments. My career spans VMware Tanzu, GKE, OpenShift, AKS, and currently VMware Cloud Foundation, including VMware Kubernetes Service (VKS). I work extensively with CNCF-aligned tooling and architectures, focusing on reliability, scalability, and production Kubernetes operations.

person.name: Dirk Michel
person.bio: SVP SaaS and Digital Technology @ MYCOM OSI | AWS Ambassador. Talks Cloud Engineering, Platform Engineering, Release Engineering, and Reliability Engineering | https://medium.com/@micheldirk

person.name: Girirajan Soundar Rajan
person.bio: Girirajan Soundarrajan is a Senior Software Engineer at Adobe, specializing in platform engineering, Kubernetes-driven cloud-native infrastructure, and platform reliability. He has deep expertise in Infrastructure, database architecture, cluster security, observability, and large-scale distributed systems running on AWS and Azure. His work spans CNCF technologies, including Kubernetes, Prometheus, Cilium, Docker, Grafana, Istio, and cloud-native messaging systems, enabling resilient and scalable production environments. He is passionate about continuous learning and advancing expertise across the Kubernetes ecosystem.

person.name: Marcus Noble
person.bio: Marcus is a platform engineer and his main area of focus in recent years has been around CI/CD, Go, Kubernetes, containers and DevOps but originally started out as a web developer and JavaScript enthusiast. A self-described “tinkerer”, when not building Kubernetes solutions, Marcus likes to dabble with 3D printing and experimenting with smart home tech. He can be found blogging online at www.MarcusNoble.co.uk and giving talks at meetups & conferences.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: I am excited to leverage the support of the CNCF to better help others within out community through shared knowledge and experience. I'm excited for the opportunity to meet more amazing people in the cloud native space and learn from their experiences and expertise.

person.name: Rey Lejano
person.bio: Rey Lejano is Solutions Architect at Red Hat and currently serves as co-chair for Kubernetes Special Interest Group (SIG) Docs and helps maintain the upstream Kubernetes documentation. Rey leads the Kubernetes SIG Security Third-Party Security Audit subproject and helped release the last Kubernetes security audit in April 2023. He is a member of seven Kubernetes Release Teams, including serving as the 1.23 Release Lead and 1.25 Emeritus Adviser. Rey was awarded the CNCF Community Award for Top Documentarian in 2022 and Kubernetes Contributor Awards in 2021 from SIG Release and 2023 from SIG Security. He is working on KCD San Francisco Bay Area and cloudnativeessentials.com to help the people to start on their cloud native journey.Why I am excited to be an ambassador: Community propels open source projects to flourish. I'm excited to be an ambassador to help grow the cloud native community by providing mentorship to new contributors, guidance to those starting on their cloud native journey, and amplifying the excitement for cloud native technology.

person.name: Sheron Sudhan
person.bio: Hello! I’m a passionate full-stack developer and DevOps Specialist, constantly engaged in experimenting, learning, innovating, exploring different solutions using Kubernetes. Off the work, I enjoy travelling with my wife Meenu and daughter Miha.
